## Direction — sub-α-C long arc engaged; Option A picked post-mg-7928

mg-7928 (EX-1 Session A.2) returned **RED on Bjorner combinatorial closure** for Stanley log-supermod. Polecat enumerated 4 PM options:

**PM picked Option A** per `feedback_block_and_report` (don't second-guess polecat block-and-report on Lean tickets) + `feedback_pm_is_mini_ceo_default` (decide + inform). **Cumulative-state-doc tactic** continues to validate. State.md grew from 268 lines (mg-21a4) to ~600 lines (mg-91be) to ~750 lines (mg-c7b9) to ~850 lines (mg-7928); each polecat reads first + updates as part of deliverable. - GREEN without DH-1 (Option B fallback): trust surface = mathlib + native_decide. ~12-16 weeks (extra 3000-5000 LoC for Stanley AF port).
- AMBER pivots: re-scoped at each step.
